zh.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG於1065年出生。她和Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN至少有1個兒子。她去世於1139年6月20日享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG于1065年出生。她和Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN至少有1个儿子。她去世于1139年6月20日享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: WEIMAR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Hans, Kurt, Reinhard.
German:
habitational name from any of several places called Weimar in Hesse and Thuringia.

variants.name: Weimer
meanings: German:
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wini ‘friend’ + mār ‘famous’ or from another, composed of the elements wīg ‘battle, fight’ + mār ‘famous’.
variant of   Weimar   1.

variants.name: Waymer
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Weimar   or   Weimer  .

nameMeanings.name: Richarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG was born in 1065. She had at least 1 son with Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN. She died on 20 June 1139, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG est née en 1065. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1139, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG wurde 1065 geboren. Sie hatte mit Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1139 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG è nata il nel 1065. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN. Morì il 20 giugno 1139, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERGは1065年に生まれた。彼女はOthon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSENとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1139年6月20日に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG(은)는 1065년 태어났다. 그녀는 Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 6월 20일 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG nasceu em 1065. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1139, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG родилась в 1065 г. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN. Она умерла 20 июня 1139 г. в возрасте 74 лет.
